subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto those whom God hath related to him who attained unto My presence, stood before My throne, and hearkened unto My call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للذین نسبهم الله الی من فاز بلقائی و حضر تلقاء عرشی و سمع ندائی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
